prompt: Describe the image in a long, detailed paragraph. Be thorough and cover the main subject, the setting, all visible objects, actions, spatial relationships, colors, and contextual details. Aim for a rich, complete description of the scene.

baseline.caption_ref: The image features a dining table with various items on it. On one side of the table, there is an open black knife placed next to a white coffee mug that has a skull design on it. This pirate-themed cup sits atop the table, adding a touch of whimsy to the scene. Additionally, another smaller cup can be seen near the edge of the table.
